HomePage.subtitle: If you look like everyone else, no one sees you. Break the standard.

EditorialShowcase.introDesc: The market doesn't buy products, it buys belonging. At SCALIA, we are not a volume agency. We build 'Lovemarks' through precise business diagnostics, merging Caribbean authenticity with global luxury standards.
EditorialShowcase.step1Desc: We don't waste time with endless questionnaires. A coffee or a WhatsApp audio is enough for me to capture the essence of your business and what your clients seek.
EditorialShowcase.step2Desc: I design the logical structure of your site. It's not just aesthetic, it's strategic: each section is designed to guide the user to the buy button without distractions.
EditorialShowcase.step3Desc: This is where the magic happens. I present unique visual mockups, created from scratch. No cheap templates; pure design that positions your brand as a leader.
EditorialShowcase.step4Desc: I transform the design into a living experience. I implement fluid animations and micro-interactions that make navigating your website feel like a luxury.
EditorialShowcase.step5Desc: We launch your sales machine. And this is where I truly shine: you have direct access to me 24/7 for unlimited changes and adjustments. Your success is our only priority.

PricingTiers.title: Let me show you why with SCALIA
PricingTiers.tier1Desc: For those stepping out of the shadows and marking their territory.
PricingTiers.tier1F1Text: Clean, intimidating structure for your competition.
PricingTiers.tier1F3Text: I answer when you call. Period.
PricingTiers.tier2Desc: The plan for those who don't just want to participate, but win.
PricingTiers.tier3Desc: The offer reserved for the elite seeking a lifelong war partner.
PricingTiers.tier3F3Text: We are available 24/7, but your project is our priority.
PricingTiers.tier3F4Text: Plans changed? Don't worry, we adapt the idea at any moment.

SocialProof.subtitle: They trust us for their growth

VideoTestimonial.quote: "Scalia didn't just create a page, they materialized my vision in record time."

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.q1: How long does it take to deliver the web infrastructure?
FAQ.a1: We operate with an agile and highly optimized model. The architecture is ready in 48 hours, and your project is live in a maximum of 1 week.
FAQ.q2: Will I really see a return on my investment?
FAQ.a2: Absolutely. We don't design webs to look pretty; we design acquisition ecosystems. Everything is optimized (speed, UX, copy) to convert traffic into qualified prospects.
FAQ.q3: Do I have to write the text for the page myself?
FAQ.a3: No. Our team takes care of the persuasive engineering (Copywriting). We understand your business goals and write texts psychologically designed to sell.

DroneShowcase.specsIncluded: Included in VANTAGE and ZENITH Plans
DroneShowcase.spec4Desc: Ready for social media in maximum quality.

Contact.name: Full Name
Contact.subtitle: Designed for those who demand excellence. Let us transform your vision into an irresistible web architecture.

About.intro: At Scalia, our identity isn't just about what we do, but how we do it. Our DNA rests on three inseparable pillars that dictate every one of our interventions.
About.p1_title: 1. Creativity: The Unexpected as a Standard
About.p1_desc: For us, creativity isn't an aesthetic luxury; it's a problem-solving tool. In a world saturated with generic solutions, we explore unconventional paths to design unique strategies.
About.p1_sub1: Audacity: Daring to shake up established codes.
About.p1_sub2: Innovation: Transforming every constraint into an opportunity for differentiation.
About.p2_title: 2. Reactivity: The Rhythm of the Market
About.p2_desc: The world moves fast; we move faster. Reactivity at Scalia is the art of capturing weak signals and adjusting course in real-time. We don't just respond to your needs, we anticipate the evolution of your environment.
About.p2_sub1: Agility: Short decision cycles for immediate execution.
About.p2_sub2: Availability: Proactive presence to guarantee the continuity of your projects.
About.p3_desc: Creativity and speed have no value unless they generate a measurable impact. We are obsessed with resource optimization and the clarity of results. At Scalia, every action is guided by a performance objective.
About.p3_sub1: Pragmatism: Prioritizing solutions that bring the greatest added value.
About.p3_sub2: Precision: Rigorous execution to transform the vision into concrete success.
About.conclusion: "Innovate with audacity, respond with agility, deliver with excellence." > This is Scalia's commitment to propel your ambitions.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: At SCALIA, protecting your personal data and privacy is an absolute priority. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, process, and protect your information when you visit our website or use our services, including our Calendly booking system.
Privacy.s1Content: We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us, such as your name, email address, phone number, company name, and project/budget details when filling out contact forms. In addition, when scheduling a meeting, we collect the data entered into the third-party platform, Calendly.
Privacy.s2Content: We use the collected information to: (a) Understand your needs and provide the requested digital agency services. (b) Manage your appointment scheduling and consulting meetings. (c) Send you communications related to your project. (d) Improve the quality of our website and user experience.
Privacy.s3Content: For appointment management and scheduling, we integrate Calendly into our website. By using this service, your contact data and appointment details are processed under Calendly's privacy policies. We recommend reviewing their policies to understand how this information is handled.
Privacy.s4Content: We implement physical, technical, and administrative security measures designed to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction. Only authorized SCALIA personnel have access to this data strictly for the development of your project.
Privacy.s5Content: We will retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, including compliance with legal, accounting, or reporting obligations.
Privacy.s6Content: You have the right to access, correct, update, or request the deletion of your personal information at any time. If you wish to exercise any of these rights, or if you have any concerns about how we handle your data, please contact us.
Privacy.s7Content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us by writing to: contact@scalia.do.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.intro: Welcome to SCALIA. These Terms of Service govern the use of our website and the ultra-premium web design and development services we offer. By accessing our site, contacting us, or scheduling a service, you agree to fully comply with these terms.
Terms.s1Content: SCALIA specializes in creating exclusive digital experiences, high-end web development, and strategic branding. We reserve the right to accept or reject projects based on our capacity, quality standards, and compatibility with the client's vision.
Terms.s2Content: Our discovery calls and consulting bookings are managed through Calendly. By scheduling, you agree to provide truthful information and attend at the agreed time. Cancellations must be made at least 24 hours in advance using the link provided by Calendly.
Terms.s3Content: All designs, code, methodologies, texts, and graphics contained on this website are the exclusive intellectual property of SCALIA. Unauthorized reproduction, distribution, or use of our material is strictly prohibited under penalty of legal action.
Terms.s4Content: The rates and budgets indicated (e.g., our Essence, Ascent, Apex plans) are indicative and may vary according to the specific requirements of the project. A project formally begins after the signing of a binding contract and receipt of the corresponding agreed deposit.
Terms.s5Content: At SCALIA, we treat all projects with strict confidentiality. If required by the client, we are willing to sign Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDAs) prior to the start of development or during the strategic audit phase.
Terms.s6Content: SCALIA will not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our website or the inability to access it. Our goal is to offer exceptional service, but we do not guarantee specific commercial results from web implementation.
Terms.s7Content: For any matters related to these Terms of Service or legal issues, please send an email to the official address: contact@scalia.do.
